qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Deprecated hash algorithms (MD5, SHA-1, RIPEMD-160) accepted for signature verification
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns weak hash algorithms accepted during signature verification, not crafted RSA secret key packet parsing or rsa crate key construction panic.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded decompression allows compression bomb attacks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns unbounded compressed-data decompression, not crafted RSA secret key packet parsing or rsa crate key construction panic.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded S2K iteration count enables CPU exhaustion attacks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns attacker-controlled S2K iteration counts during password-based decryption, not crafted RSA secret key packet parsing or rsa crate key construction panic.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: DSA secret key material not zeroized, enabling memory-based key recovery
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause: this finding concerns missing DSA private-key zeroization after object drop, not crafted RSA secret key packet parsing or rsa crate key construction panic.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described rPGP path where parsing a special RSA secret key packet passes malformed key material into the vulnerable RustCrypto rsa crate and triggers a panic. The qualifying findings cover other rPGP security issues in signature hash selection, compressed data decompression, S2K derivation, and DSA key zeroization.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-7587-4wv6-m68m describes an availability issue caused by parsing a special RSA secret key packet that reaches vulnerable rsa crate key construction and panics.
vuln_1_weak_signature_algorithms reports src/packet/signature/de.rs and src/crypto/rsa.rs signature verification hash selection, not RSA secret-key parsing or construction.
vuln_2_compression_bomb reports src/packet/compressed_data.rs decompression without output limits.
vuln_3_s2k_dos reports src/types/s2k.rs decode_count and derive_key CPU exhaustion during password-based decryption.
vuln_4_dsa_zeroization reports src/crypto/dsa.rs Zeroize implementation for DSA secret keys.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so PoC execution is not applicable under the judging rules.
